children.heading: .—Cost or pricing data
children.label: 1 .—Cost or pricing data
children.text: The term “cost or pricing data” means all facts that, as of the date of agreement on the price of a contract (or the price of a contract modification), or, if applicable consistent with , another date agreed upon between the parties, a prudent buyer or seller would reasonably expect to affect price negotiations significantly. Such term does not include information that is judgmental, but does include the factual information from which a judgment was derived.section 3706(a)(2) of this title

children.heading: .—Subcontract
children.label: 2 .—Subcontract
children.text: The term “subcontract” includes a transfer of commercial products or commercial services between divisions, subsidiaries, or affiliates of a contractor or a subcontractor.
